FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Bullish Momentum Amid Easing Geopolitical Risks and Hawkish Inflation Outlook
tldr_points: US-Iran draft agreement reduces Middle East tensions, lessening safe‑haven JPY demand.
Fed officials signal inflation persistence, supporting a hawkish bias for USD.
Technical setup shows price approaching MA20 with RSI indicating room for upside.
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY tipped to rise as geopolitical risk eases and Fed inflation concerns bolster dollar.
FX.comment: Bullish bias driven by easing geopolitical risk and hawkish inflation outlook, with technical alignment near MA20 support.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] FLAT: Mixed AI Signals Offset by Broad Market Strength
tldr_points: AI-driven chip stocks show rebound while mega‑cap software faces spending concerns.
Defensive buying in distressed names such as Planet Fitness signals selective value interest.
Technical backdrop remains range‑bound with key moving averages undefined due to data lag.
STOCKS.excerpt: Mixed AI headlines and defensive buying keep S&P 500 range‑bound near current levels.
STOCKS.comment: Mixed AI headlines and defensive buying keep S&P 500 range‑bound near current levels.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Detects Regulatory Tailwinds as Ecosystem Matures
tldr_points: Everclear shutdown erodes DeFi sentiment but limited BTC impact
Chainlink PAC gains bipartisan support signaling regulatory thaw
MoonPay Trade expansion and HYPE surge reflect institutional demand
CRYPTO.excerpt: Regulatory endorsements and MoonPay expansion outweigh DeFi shakeout; BTC set for upside.
CRYPTO.comment: Regulatory endorsements and institutional adoption support upside.
